meaning: n.狼,残忍贪婪之人,极度的穷困vt.狼吞虎咽,大吃vi.猎狼
examples: The wolf clawed at the tree and howled the whole night.
The Rams held on to defeat the Nevada Wolf Pack in Reno, 32-28.
He thought he had better track this wolf and see where it lived.
Ultimately, Noble and Black Wolf say they're just happy to have fans up and dancing.
Black Wolf's singing is timeless, and the album, Noble says, takes its cues from hip-hop.
